StyledText.Data: Codebase versions Codebase versions gives developers possibilitites to test new features using specific branches. A new codebase version can be selected in Preview of a Package.

CharacterStyle.Text: Codebase versions gives developers possibilitites to test new features using specific branches. A new codebase version can be selected in Preview of a Package.

StyledText.Data: This is the name of the theme as it appears in the FAT when creating a new Title. It doesn’t need to be unique.
All codebases belongs to a specific Base project.
Find all packages using this codebase

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( Baseproject Codebase Version::Version comment )
Not IsEmpty ( Baseproject Codebase Version::Version comment )
